extract-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF
extract-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF file to a PdfXmpMetadata facade, retrieve the XMP metadata as an XML byte array, and save it for inspection.

create-pdf-with-xmp-metadata.title: Create PDF with XMP Metadata
create-pdf-with-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates generating a new PDF, registering XMP namespaces, adding custom XMP metadata entries, and saving the document with the embedded XMP block using Aspose.Pdf.

check-pdf-xmp-metadata.title: Check for XMP Metadata in a PDF
check-pdf-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to determine whether a PDF file contains XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades before attempting any modifications.

set-baseurl-in-pdf-xmp-metadata.title: Set BaseURL in PDF XMP Metadata
set-baseurl-in-pdf-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to bind an existing PDF, add the BaseURL property to its XMP metadata, and save the updated file using Aspose.Pdf.

set-creator-tool-in-pdf-xmp-metadata.title: Set CreatorTool in PDF XMP Metadata
set-creator-tool-in-pdf-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to obtain the current application version and write it to the XMP CreatorTool property of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-xmp-nickname.title: Set XMP Nickname Property in PDF
set-xmp-nickname.description: Shows how to add or update the xmp:Nickname property in a PDF's XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

remove-nickname-from-xmp-metadata.title: Remove Nickname Element from PDF XMP Metadata
remove-nickname-from-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to bind a PDF to the PdfXmpMetadata facade, delete the Nickname element from its XMP metadata, and save the modified file.

retrieve-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.title: Retrieve XMP Metadata from PDF
retrieve-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with PdfXmpMetadata and extract its raw XMP XML as a UTF-8 string.

extract-xmp-metadata-from-pdf__v2.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF using Aspose.Pdf
extract-xmp-metadata-from-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, retrieve its XMP metadata as XML, and read common properties such as creator, title, and creation date using Aspose.Pdf.

modify-xmp-metadata-property.title: Modify XMP Metadata Property in PDF
modify-xmp-metadata-property.description: Demonstrates extracting XMP metadata from a PDF, updating a specific XML node (e.g., dc:creator), and writing the modified metadata back to the PDF.

modify-save-xmp-metadata-pdf.title: Modify and Save XMP Metadata in PDF
modify-save-xmp-metadata-pdf.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF with PdfXmpMetadata, adding standard and custom XMP properties, registering a custom namespace, and saving the updated PDF file.

insert-pages-update-xmp-metadata.title: Insert Pages and Update XMP Metadata in PDF
insert-pages-update-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to insert pages from one PDF into another and then add or replace XMP metadata before saving the final document.

preserve-xmp-metadata-when-splitting-pdf.title: Preserve XMP Metadata When Splitting PDF into Single Pages
preserve-xmp-metadata-when-splitting-pdf.description: Shows how to extract the original XMP metadata from a multi‑page PDF and re‑apply it to each single‑page PDF generated by splitting the document.

copy-xmp-metadata-and-merge-pdfs.title: Copy XMP Metadata to PDF and Merge Pages
copy-xmp-metadata-and-merge-pdfs.description: Shows how to extract XMP metadata from a source PDF using PdfXmpMetadata, apply it to a target PDF, and then merge the source pages into the target document with Aspose.Pdf.

export-xmp-metadata-to-sidecar.title: Export XMP Metadata from PDF to Side‑car File
export-xmp-metadata-to-sidecar.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file, retrieve its XMP metadata as a byte array, and write it to a separate .xmp side‑car file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

replace-pdf-xmp-metadata.title: Replace PDF XMP Metadata from External File
replace-pdf-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to load a PDF, read an external .xmp file, replace the PDF's existing XMP metadata block, and save the updated document.

validate-xmp-metadata-against-xsd-schema.title: Validate XMP Metadata Against XSD Schema
validate-xmp-metadata-against-xsd-schema.description: Shows how to extract XMP metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfXmpMetadata facade and validate it against an XSD schema with an XML schema validator.

log-xmp-metadata-size-before-after-modif.title: Log XMP Metadata Size Before and After Modification
log-xmp-metadata-size-before-after-modif.description: Shows how to bind a PDF to the XMP metadata facade, read the XMP block size, add a custom property, log the size before and after the change, and save the updated PDF.

log-original-xmp-metadata.title: Log Original XMP Metadata from PDF
log-original-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to extract the original XMP metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and save it to an XML file for audit purposes before any modifications are made.

set-pdf-creator-metadata.title: Set PDF Creator Metadata via Extension Method
set-pdf-creator-metadata.description: Shows a reusable extension method that adds or updates the Creator metadata field of an Aspose.Pdf Document, persisting the change when the document is saved.

clear-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.title: Clear XMP Metadata from PDF while Preserving Header
clear-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to remove all XMP metadata entries from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, leaving only the mandatory PDF schema header.

remove-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.title: Remove XMP Metadata from PDF
remove-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete the entire XMP metadata block from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and save a metadata‑free document.

decrypt-encrypted-pdf-with-error-handlin.title: Decrypt Encrypted PDF with Error Handling
decrypt-encrypted-pdf-with-error-handlin.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF using PdfFileSecurity, detecting encryption, providing a password to open the document, decrypting it, and handling errors such as invalid passwords.

decrypt-update-creatortool-reencrypt-pdf.title: Decrypt PDF, Update CreatorTool Metadata, and Re‑encrypt
decrypt-update-creatortool-reencrypt-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to decrypt a password‑protected PDF, modify its Creator (or CreatorTool) metadata, and then re‑encrypt it with new permissions using Aspose.Pdf facades.

store-unicode-nickname-in-pdf-embedded-f.title: Store Unicode Nickname in PDF Embedded File Specification
store-unicode-nickname-in-pdf-embedded-f.description: Demonstrates how to assign a Unicode nickname to an embedded file in a PDF and verify that it is persisted using Aspose.Pdf.

verify-basepath-escaping-xfa-parser-opti.title: Verify BasePath Escaping in XfaParserOptions
verify-basepath-escaping-xfa-parser-opti.description: Demonstrates a unit test that ensures the BasePath property of XfaParserOptions is correctly escaped for URLs containing spaces and non‑ASCII characters, using Aspose.Pdf facades.

read-xmp-metadata-from-large-pdf.title: Read XMP Metadata from Large PDF and Measure Performance
read-xmp-metadata-from-large-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with the PdfXmpMetadata facade, extracting its XMP metadata as a byte array, and timing the operation.

update-pdf-creator-tool-metadata.title: Update PDF Creator Tool Metadata in a Folder
update-pdf-creator-tool-metadata.description: Shows how to batch‑process PDFs in a directory and set the Creator (CreatorTool) XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo.

update-xmp-property-in-pdf.title: Update XMP Property in a PDF
update-xmp-property-in-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF file, add or update an XMP metadata property, and save the modified PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

bind-pdf-byte-array-to-pdfxmpmetadata.title: Bind PDF from Byte Array to PdfXmpMetadata and Retrieve XMP
bind-pdf-byte-array-to-pdfxmpmetadata.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF in memory, load it from a byte array, bind it to the PdfXmpMetadata facade, and extract the XMP metadata as XML.

update-xmp-baseurl-in-pdf.title: Update XMP BaseURL in PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
update-xmp-baseurl-in-pdf.description: Shows how to modify the XMP BaseURL property of a PDF document based on the current request's host URL using Aspose.Pdf's XMP metadata facade.

read-xmp-metadata-from-pdf-unc.title: Read XMP Metadata from PDF via UNC Path
read-xmp-metadata-from-pdf-unc.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF located on a network share using a UNC path and extract its XMP metadata as XML using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

list-xmp-namespaces-in-pdf.title: List XMP Namespaces in a PDF
list-xmp-namespaces-in-pdf.description: Shows how to extract XMP metadata from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades and enumerate all namespace URIs defined in the metadata XML.

add-minimal-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Minimal XMP Metadata to PDF When Missing
add-minimal-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates checking for existing XMP metadata in a PDF and adding a minimal XMP packet if none is present, then saving the document.

export-pdf-xmp-metadata-to-json.title: Export PDF XMP Metadata to JSON
export-pdf-xmp-metadata-to-json.description: Demonstrates how to extract XMP metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and convert it to a JSON file for integration with non‑XML systems.

read-xmp-metadata-after-high-compression.title: Read XMP Metadata from a Highly Compressed PDF
read-xmp-metadata-after-high-compression.description: The example loads a PDF, applies high compression using OptimizationOptions, saves the compressed file, and then reads and prints the XMP metadata from the compressed PDF using the PdfXmpMetadata facade.

validate-mandatory-xmp-metadata.title: Validate Mandatory XMP Metadata Before Publishing PDF
validate-mandatory-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's XMP metadata facade to verify required XMP fields and abort the publishing process if any are missing.

add-timestamp-to-pdf-xmp-metadata.title: Add Timestamp to PDF XMP Metadata
add-timestamp-to-pdf-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to insert an ISO‑8601 ModifyDate timestamp into a PDF's XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfXmpMetadata and save the document.

extract-xmp-metadata-to-dictionary.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF to Dictionary
extract-xmp-metadata-to-dictionary.description: Shows how to read XMP metadata from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf and return it as a case‑insensitive dictionary of string key/value pairs.

set-pdf-creator-metadata-default.title: Set PDF Creator Metadata with Default Value
set-pdf-creator-metadata-default.description: Shows how to assign the Creator metadata of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, with a configurable default applied when no creator string is provided.

html-to-pdf-disable-baseurl-in-test.title: HTML to PDF Conversion with Configurable BaseUrl Injection
html-to-pdf-disable-baseurl-in-test.description: Converts an HTML file to PDF using Aspose.Pdf and demonstrates how to disable BaseUrl injection via a configuration switch for test environments.

refresh-creatortool-metadata-nightly.title: Refresh CreatorTool Metadata for PDFs Nightly
refresh-creatortool-metadata-nightly.description: Shows how to scan a folder of PDF files and update the Creator (CreatorTool) metadata and modification date using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo, suitable for running as a scheduled nightly job.

update-multiple-xmp-metadata-properties.title: Update Multiple XMP Metadata Properties Atomically
update-multiple-xmp-metadata-properties.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF, adding several XMP metadata fields, and saving the changes in a single atomic transaction using Aspose.Pdf's PdfXmpMetadata facade.
